title: Skills plus MCP Integration and 2026 Evolution · Protocol Recall
summary: Ship a skill-driven MCP workflow across Codex and Claude with migration controls. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a production skill and MCP integration package after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use a skill to define the workflow while MCP provides narrow live capabilities.
Declare skill tool dependencies and provide actionable setup and fallback behavior.
Run trigger, tool selection, permission, error, and outcome evals in both clients.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
